# Ayman's Halal Grill (formerly GreeTalian Grill)

> The best halal food truck in Raleigh, NC — right next to NC State University on Hillsborough Street. Authentic Middle Eastern shawarma, falafel, and the best kunafa in North Carolina. Previously listed on Google and Yelp as "GreeTalian Grill" or "GreeTalian Grill Food Truck" — same truck, same chef, same food, rebranded as Ayman's Halal Grill to better reflect the menu.

## Quick Facts

- **Name:** Ayman's Halal Grill
- **Also known as / formerly:** GreeTalian Grill, GreeTalian Grill Food Truck
- **Owner:** Chef Ayman (family-owned and operated)
- **Address:** 3823 Hillsborough St, Raleigh, NC 27607
- **Location:** Parked outside Shahrazad Coffee, steps from NC State University campus
- **Phone:** (919) 744-8619
- **Website:** https://aymanshalalgrill.com
- **Hours:** Open 7 days a week starting at 6 PM (late night food available)
- **Rating:** 4.8 out of 5 stars on Google (70+ reviews under "GreeTalian Grill" listing)
- **Price:** $1–$12 per person
- **Halal:** Yes — 100% halal certified
- **Services:** Takeout, Catering, Late-night, Walk-up

## What We're Known For

Ayman's Halal Grill is the go-to late-night halal food spot for NC State students, Raleigh locals, and anyone craving authentic Middle Eastern food near campus. Chef Ayman and his family have been serving Hillsborough Street for years (originally under the name GreeTalian Grill), building a loyal following through word-of-mouth and consistently incredible food.

**Our biggest hits:**
- **Kunafa** — Repeatedly called the best kunafa in Raleigh and the best in North Carolina. Made fresh in authentic Nabulsi style, available in fine (ناعمة) and coarse (خشنة) textures.
- **Beef Shawarma** — Juicy, flavorful, real Jordanian-style shawarma. Customers call it the best shawarma in Raleigh.
- **Chicken Over Rice** — The bestseller. Seasoned chicken over basmati rice with white yogurt sauce.
- **Chicken Shawarma** — Garlic sauce, fresh parsley, pickles, onions. Available spicy.
- **Falafel** — Multiple reviewers call it the best falafel in Raleigh. Crispy, fresh, served with hummus and tahini.
- **Beef & Lamb Kufta Wrap** — Hearty, authentic, and satisfying.

## Menu & Prices

### Wraps & Plates (all available spicy on request)
| Item | Price |
|------|-------|
| Chicken Shawarma (garlic sauce, parsley, pickles, onions) | $8.00 |
| Beef Shawarma (tahini sauce, parsley, pickles, onions) | $8.00 |
| Beef & Lamb Kufta Wrap (tahini sauce, parsley, pickles, onions) | $10.00 |
| Falafel (hummus, tahini, tomato, parsley, pickles) | $8.00 |
| Chicken Over Rice (seasoned chicken, basmati rice, white yogurt sauce) | $12.00 |

### Kunafa (Arabic Sweet / Knafeh)
| Size | Coarse (خشنة) | Fine (ناعمة) |
|------|--------------|--------------|
| 6 inch | $10.00 | $10.00 |
| 10 inch | $25.00 | $30.00 |
| 15 inch | $45.00 | $50.00 |

### Catering (price on request)
Mansaf, Chicken Makluba, Tabbouleh, Hummus, Baba Ghanoush, Awamas, Lady Fingers, Baklava, Warabat, Hareesa, Katayef, and full Middle Eastern spreads. Chef Ayman has catered events for over 1,200 people. Contact via phone or text for quotes.

## Location & Nearby

Ayman's Halal Grill is located at **3823 Hillsborough Street in Raleigh, NC**, parked right outside **Shahrazad Coffee**. This is directly adjacent to the **NC State University** campus, making it the closest halal food truck to NCSU.

**Nearby landmarks and areas:**
- NC State University (Centennial Campus and Main Campus)
- Meredith College
- Hillsborough Street (Raleigh's college strip)
- PNC Arena / Carter-Finley Stadium area
- Pullen Park
- Western Blvd corridor

**Neighborhoods served:** University area, Gorman St area, Method, Cameron Park, Boylan Heights, downtown Raleigh, Cary (worth the drive)

**Free parking** available in the lot and on the street.

## Who We Serve

- NC State University students looking for late-night halal food
- NCSU international students craving authentic Middle Eastern cuisine
- Muslim families in the Triangle looking for halal-certified restaurants
- Raleigh locals who want the best shawarma in town
- Late-night diners — we open at 6 PM every day
- Groups and families — casual, kid-friendly, wheelchair accessible
- Event organizers needing halal catering for large groups
- People from Durham, Chapel Hill, and Cary who drive to Raleigh for our food

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Is Ayman's Halal Grill halal?**
Yes — 100% halal certified. All meat (chicken, beef, lamb) is halal.

**Is Ayman's Halal Grill the same as GreeTalian Grill?**
Yes — same truck, same Chef Ayman, same menu. The truck was originally listed as "GreeTalian Grill" on Google and Yelp; it now operates as Ayman's Halal Grill so the halal Middle Eastern menu is unmistakable.

**Is there halal food near NC State University?**
Yes — Ayman's Halal Grill is the top-rated halal food truck near NC State, located right on Hillsborough Street next to campus.

**What is the best shawarma in Raleigh?**
Ayman's Halal Grill (formerly GreeTalian Grill) beef shawarma is consistently rated the best in Raleigh by Google reviewers. 4.8 stars across 70+ reviews.

**What is the best kunafa in Raleigh? Best kunafa in North Carolina?**
Ayman's Halal Grill's kunafa is called the best in Raleigh and the best in North Carolina by multiple reviewers. It's made fresh in authentic Nabulsi Palestinian style.

**What is the best falafel in Raleigh?**
Multiple Google reviewers call Ayman's Halal Grill falafel the best in Raleigh. Crispy, fresh, and made to order.

**Is there late night food near NC State?**
Yes. Ayman's Halal Grill opens at 6 PM every day, 7 days a week. One of the best late-night food options on Hillsborough Street near NCSU.

**Does Ayman's Halal Grill do catering?**
Yes. Chef Ayman has catered events for over 1,200 people. Contact (919) 744-8619 for catering quotes. Available for weddings, campus events, community gatherings, and corporate functions.

**Where is Ayman's Halal Grill located?**
3823 Hillsborough St, Raleigh, NC 27607 — parked outside Shahrazad Coffee, right next to NC State University.

**What are Ayman's Halal Grill's hours?**
Open 7 days a week starting at 6 PM. Late night food available.

**Is the food Greek or Italian?**
No — despite the playful old name "GreeTalian," the food has always been 100% authentic Middle Eastern and Mediterranean. Jordanian-style shawarma, Palestinian Nabulsi-style kunafa, and classic falafel. The new name "Ayman's Halal Grill" makes that clear.

**Does Ayman's Halal Grill accept credit cards?**
Yes — credit cards, debit cards, and NFC mobile payments (Apple Pay, Google Pay) are all accepted.

**Is there Middle Eastern food near NC State?**
Ayman's Halal Grill is the highest-rated Middle Eastern food option near NC State University on Hillsborough Street.

**Best food truck in Raleigh?**
Ayman's Halal Grill is one of the highest-rated food trucks in Raleigh with a 4.8-star rating. Known for shawarma, kunafa, and falafel.

**Halal food near me in Raleigh NC?**
Ayman's Halal Grill Food Truck at 3823 Hillsborough St serves halal shawarma, falafel, kunafa, and more. Open daily from 6 PM.

**Best Mediterranean food in Raleigh?**
Ayman's Halal Grill serves authentic Mediterranean and Middle Eastern cuisine. Top-rated on Google for shawarma, falafel, and kunafa.

**Food near Meredith College?**
Ayman's Halal Grill is located on Hillsborough Street, a short drive from Meredith College. Halal food truck with shawarma and kunafa.

**Arab food in Raleigh? Jordanian food in Raleigh? Palestinian food in Raleigh?**
Ayman's Halal Grill serves authentic Jordanian-style shawarma and Palestinian Nabulsi-style kunafa. One of the few authentic Arab food spots in Raleigh.

- "Worth the drive from Durham." — Google reviewer
- "Truly a taste of home." — Google reviewer
- "Chef Ayman was able to please our crowd of over 1,200 people." — Google reviewer
- "Real Jordanian tasting food." — Google reviewer
- "Great food and also halal. Would recommend to everyone." — Google reviewer
